hero.title: Oracle's Whisper
hero.subtitle: Discover gentle power within you
hero.description: Find strength in gentle voices from ancient wisdom

quiz.storyPart2: Steps beneath your feet lead to a faintly visible temple, surrounded by flowing golden clouds.
quiz.storyPart3: You don't remember how you got here—maybe it was a brief pause after early mornings and late nights; maybe a moment of daze on the morning commute; maybe a daze while revising a plan late at night. Just in that instant, you suddenly asked yourself: "What am I doing?"
quiz.storyPart5: At the temple entrance, a deity stood there, speaking as gently as a neighbor:
quiz.storyPart8: He smiled and led you into the temple, where twelve deities await to help you find the answer...
quiz.question: Question

result.title: Your Oracle Revealed
result.unlockDesc: Get a personalized 1000-word oracle report with guidance, insights, and practices tailored to your unique spiritual path.
result.inputPlaceholder: What would you like guidance on? (Optional)
result.inputHint: Share any confusion, questions, or areas of life you would like the oracle to address...
result.waitForPayment: Complete payment to generate your report

footer.weAreGods: We are all children of gods, you deserve a good life.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy

collectContent.answers: Quiz answers: 12 question choices (saved in browser sessionStorage)

privacy.noServer: All data is stored on your device. We do not collect or store your personal information on our servers.
privacy.useContent: To generate your oracle result and report, and to improve question design and accuracy.

retentionContent.answers: Quiz answers: Cleared when you close browser tab
retentionContent.language: Language preference: Stored in localStorage until you delete it
retentionContent.input: User input: Not stored after report is generated

privacy.rightsContent: You may clear your browser data at any time, or opt out of any service by closing the tab.
privacy.thirdPartyContent: We use PayPal for payment processing (please review PayPal's privacy policy) and DeepSeek API for AI generation (your input is sent securely).
privacy.contactContent: Questions? Contact us at: langaijun@foxmail.com, Twitter: @wangwei111223

disclaimer.title: Disclaimer
disclaimer.not: This oracle quiz is for entertainment and self-reflection purposes only. It is not:
disclaimer.aiContent: Paid reports are generated by AI (DeepSeek). While we strive for accuracy and helpfulness:
aiItems: AI may occasionally provide incomplete or inaccurate information
You are responsible for your own decisions and actions
If you're experiencing serious mental health concerns, please seek professional help
disclaimer.accuracyContent: Your quiz result reflects specific questions and answers you provided. Different answers may yield different results.
disclaimer.warrantyContent: We make no warranties, expressed or implied, about the completeness, accuracy, or reliability of content, or the availability or functionality of service.
disclaimer.contactContent: Questions or concerns? Contact us at: langaijun@foxmail.com, Twitter: @wangwei111223
disclaimer.closing: We are all children of gods. You deserve a good life.
